title: Binomial Coefficient Calculation
mermaid: graph TD A1[[Input: n (Total items), k (Items to choose)] --> B1([Check: n >= 0 and k >= 0]) style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 B1 -- Yes --> C1([Check: k <= n]) B1 -- No --> Z1[[Output: Error - Invalid Input] style Z1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff C1 -- Yes --> D1([Check: k == 0 or k == n]) style C1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 D1 -- Yes --> E1[[Output: 1] style E1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff D1 -- No --> F1([Check: k > n/2]) style F1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 F1 -- Yes --> G1([k = n - k]) style G1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff F1 -- No --> H1([Initialize: result = 1]) style H1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 G1 --> H1 H1 --> I1{[Loop: i from 1 to k]} style I1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 I1 -- Yes --> J1["[result = result * (n - i + 1)]"] style J1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff J1 --> K1([result = result / i]) style K1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff K1 --> L1([i = i + 1]) style L1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff L1 --> I1 I1 -- No --> M1[[Output: result] style M1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff C1 -- No --> Z1
source_text: Source information to be added - please specify the book, paper, or reference material used by the LLM to generate this flowchart.
